jobs.name: LMS health check: Check for Le

payload.message: LMS health check: Check for Learning Management Service errors in the last 15 minutes using logs_error_count. If errors exist, search logs for details and inspect a trace if a trace_id is available. Post a short summary to chat 843d8a96-c848-4c28-8b00-215dcb4d3db3 via mcp_webchat_ui_message. If no errors, report "System looks healthy — no LMS errors in the last 15 minutes."
